project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: All Note Data + Attachments (Encrypted or Plaintext)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: User creates backup of all data including attachments. Backup exported as .nnbackupz file to user-selected directory. Supports optional encryption.

flow_steps.code: for await (const file of db.backup.export({ type: "mobile", encrypt: SettingsService.get().encryptedBackup && !!user, mode: backupType }))
flow_steps.details: User triggers backup. All notes, notebooks, tags, and settings exported into a single backup stream.
All data (encrypted or plaintext) and attachment encrypted blobs written to zip file.

flow_steps.code: const file = await ScopedStorage.createFile(androidBackupDirectory?.uri, ...); await copyFileAsync('file://${zipOutputFile}', file.uri);
flow_steps.details: Backup zip file saved to user-selected directory via Android Scoped Storage / Storage Access Framework.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: User restores from .nnbackup or .nnbackupz file. Decrypts and imports all note data.

flow_steps.details: User selects backup file via SAF file picker. Reads entire backup file into buffer.
Backup decrypted if encrypted (user prompted for password/key). All data imported into local database.

flow_steps.code: prompt user for password or encryption key
flow_steps.details: If backup is encrypted, user must provide password or encryption key for decryption.
